data.body: EPIC jira-reb-687 STATE (durable checkpoint). Branch feat/llm-failure-handling, 5 commits on stack ALL hooks-green + plan-review PASS: 278fedf32 debug-fix(sportful-starred-meerkat), a63ae39cc arawana(RED baseline), ed47d9289 mamba(classifier failure.py), 4c5e03d89 arcticduck(transport retry), 2b72bf60a hoopoe(liveness timeouts). Children arawana/mamba/arcticduck/hoopoe: claimed in_progress, PASS attestations (arcticduck 8 iters, hoopoe 5 iters). REMAINING open children: drake(silent-success, review iter3 running), anole(agent-build invariants, exp-log prepped, not reviewed), blackbear(INTEGRATOR lands last, exp-log prepped, not reviewed). CRITICAL PROCESS NOTES: (1) review children that depend on committed stack code with 'rebar review-plan <id> --ref HEAD' — default ref=origin/main snapshot lacks the stack -> false 'symbol doesn't exist' blocks; the --ref HEAD attestation IS accepted by claim. (2) claim while PASS attestation valid, remediate advisories in CODE not description (re-editing invalidates attestation). (3) config knobs go on LLMConfig (src/rebar/llm/config.py) with REBAR_LLM_* env, NOT VerifyConfig. (4) commit with venv active so pre-commit typecheck hook finds mypy; bot email joeoakhart+bot@navapbc.com. (5) run gate ops with REBAR_MCP_ALLOW_LLM=1, background ~11-13min each. ENDGAME not started: git rebase origin/main (advanced to 965fd9ee+), push stack to gerrit refs/for/main, get LLM-Review+1 AND Verified+1 per change, close children after Verified+1 bottom-first, close bug meerkat --reason, close epic, submit top. Side bugs left open: succinct-formable-kite (grounding FP), middle-actinium-thrush (signature-write lock).
